title: pneumonanthe interrupta
intro: Pneumonanthe interrupta, also known as the cut-leaved sundew or interrupted sundew, is a carnivorous plant species that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting insects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pneumonanthe interrupta include its potential to treat wounds and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tincture or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
